Class MagicCommand.Builder<S>

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.MagicCommand.Builder<S>
Type Parameters:
S - sender type
Enclosing class:
MagicCommand
public static final class MagicCommand.Builder<S> extends Object
Builder API that produces a concrete MagicCommand.
